mega.title: PDF tools built for fast document work.
mega.copy: Convert, organize, secure, and optimize files from one clean workspace.

hub.title: Every tool you need to work with PDFs in one place
hub.description: Every tool you need to use PDFs, at your fingertips. Merge, split, compress, convert, protect, sign, and organize PDFs with just a few clicks.

toolbar.title: Text to PDF
toolbar.authenticated: Autosave, history, and secure downloads are active.
toolbar.guest: Guest exports are private and expire automatically.

export.shareUnavailable: Sharing is not available on this browser.
export.emptyDocument: Add text before generating a PDF.

history.signInPrompt: Sign in to keep document history across sessions.

footer.description: Flowauxi Tools is a modern all-in-one workspace for PDFs, documents, images, and AI-powered file tools. Designed for speed, simplicity, and productivity, it helps users convert, compress, edit, organize, and optimize files effortlessly for everyday work.

text_to_pdf.name: Text to PDF
text_to_pdf.description: Create polished PDF documents from rich text, lists, symbols, and formatted content.

pdf_to_docx.name: PDF to Word
pdf_to_docx.description: Convert PDF files into editable DOC and DOCX documents with clean structure.

docx_to_pdf.name: Word to PDF
docx_to_pdf.description: Turn DOC and DOCX files into crisp PDF documents ready to share.

merge_pdf.name: Merge PDF
merge_pdf.description: Combine PDFs in the order you want with an easy document merger.

split_pdf.name: Split PDF
split_pdf.description: Separate one page or a full page range into independent PDF files.

compress_pdf.name: Compress PDF
compress_pdf.description: Reduce file size while preserving sharp, share-ready PDF quality.

pdf_to_ppt.name: PDF to PowerPoint
pdf_to_ppt.description: Turn PDF files into editable PPT and PPTX slide decks for presentations.

pdf_to_excel.name: PDF to Excel
pdf_to_excel.description: Pull tables and data from PDFs into editable spreadsheets.

ppt_to_pdf.name: PowerPoint to PDF
ppt_to_pdf.description: Convert presentation slides into polished PDF files for sharing.

excel_to_pdf.name: Excel to PDF
excel_to_pdf.description: Export spreadsheets as clean PDFs while preserving layout and readability.

edit_pdf.name: Edit PDF
edit_pdf.description: Add text, images, shapes, highlights, and annotations to PDF files.

image_to_pdf.name: Image to PDF
image_to_pdf.description: Turn JPG, PNG, and image scans into organized PDF documents.

pdf_to_image.name: PDF to Image
pdf_to_image.description: Export PDF pages as high-quality images for sharing or archiving.

rotate_pdf.name: Rotate PDF
rotate_pdf.description: Rotate one page or every page in a PDF and save the corrected file.

unlock_pdf.name: Unlock PDF
unlock_pdf.description: Remove document restrictions from files you own and need to edit.

watermark_pdf.name: Watermark PDF
watermark_pdf.description: Apply text or image watermarks across PDF pages with consistent placement.

ocr.name: OCR
ocr.description: Recognize text from scanned documents and make content searchable.

protect_pdf.name: Protect PDF
protect_pdf.description: Add password protection and access controls to sensitive PDF files.

sign_pdf.name: Sign PDF
sign_pdf.description: Prepare documents for signatures and everyday approval workflows.

html_to_pdf.name: HTML to PDF
html_to_pdf.description: Render web pages, invoices, and HTML content as reliable PDF files.

errors.emptyTextPdfDocument: Add text before generating a PDF.
errors.pdfBackendUnavailable: The PDF processing service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.pdfShapingUnavailable: The PDF service is not ready to render Indian-script text. Please retry after the service refreshes.
errors.pdfGlyphPreflightUnavailable: PDF font validation is not available on the server.
errors.fontNotRegistered: A required PDF font is not available on the server.
errors.unsupportedGlyph: Some characters in this document are not supported by the selected PDF font.

files.title: Tools | Flowauxi
files.description: Choose a PDF or document tool in Flowauxi Tools.

textToPdf.title: Text to PDF | Flowauxi Tools
textToPdf.description: Create secure PDFs from text with Flowauxi Tools.
